ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the book */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that published the book */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee responsible for the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in inventory */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the book record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Remaining leave days the employee has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_marks" (
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mark */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being marked */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who marked the book */,
  "mark_type" TEXT /* Type of mark (e.g., review, edit, approval) */,
  "mark_description" TEXT /* Description of the mark */,
  "mark_date" TEXT /* Date the mark was made */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the mark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_marks_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_marks_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the leave request */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of leave days requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager is responsible for */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the leave type is paid or unpaid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)
